login.title: Sign in

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.lead: Enter the email for your workspace account.
forgotPassword.cardSubtitle: We'll tell you whether this email is registered.

errors.fallback: Unable to send reset instructions right now.

RESET_EMAIL_SENT.body: This email is registered. Password reset instructions have been sent to your inbox.

EMAIL_NOT_FOUND.body: No account is registered with this email. Check the spelling or create a new account.

OAUTH_ONLY.body: This email is registered with Google or Microsoft sign-in. We sent instructions to your inbox.

ACCOUNT_DISABLED.body: This email is registered, but the account is disabled. Contact support if you need help.

RATE_LIMITED.body: This email is registered, but you've requested too many resets. Try again in an hour.

verifyEmailPending.title: Verify to create account
verifyEmailPending.lead: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to your email. Your account is created only after verification.
verifyEmailPending.cardSubtitle: Check your inbox for the code.

errors.fallback: Unable to complete registration right now.

REGISTRATION_CODE_SENT.body: A new verification code has been sent to your inbox.

EMAIL_TAKEN.body: This email is already registered. Sign in instead.

NO_PENDING_REGISTRATION.body: This sign-up session expired. Enter your details again.

RATE_LIMITED.body: You've requested too many codes. Try again in an hour.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.lead: Set a new password for your workspace account.
resetPassword.cardSubtitle: You'll sign in again after saving.
resetPassword.successBody: Sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.invalidBody: This password reset link is missing or malformed.
resetPassword.expiredBody: This reset link is no longer valid. Request a new one.

errors.fallback: Unable to update your password right now.

notConfiguredMessage.google: Copy mobile/.env.example to mobile/.env and set EXPO_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_* client IDs. For API mode, also configure backend OAuth in application-local.yml (see README).
notConfiguredMessage.microsoft: Copy mobile/.env.example to mobile/.env and set EXPO_PUBLIC_MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID. For API mode, also configure backend OAuth in application-local.yml (see README).

today.doneSubDefault: We'll surface what needs you next.

mockAiHandled.line3: Flagged usage rights in TrailPeak packet

aiNote.timeSensitivePitch: This pitch has time-sensitive terms or risks worth reviewing today.
aiNote.worthReplyClarify: Worth a reply — budget or scope may still need clarification.
aiNote.reviewWhenReady: Review this brand pitch when you have a moment.
aiNote.draftNeedsApproval: This draft requires your approval before it can be sent.
aiNote.quoteDraftNeedsApproval: Quote drafts require your approval before send.
aiNote.dealWaitingProof: This deal is waiting on publish proof or delivery evidence before payout can move.
aiNote.brandReviewProof: Creator proof is in. Confirm brand sign-off to release escrow.
aiNote.uploadProofReleaseEscrow: Upload publish proof to release escrow.
aiNote.highValueClaimsReview: High-value brief with claims review window — worth confirming rights before quote.
aiNote.broadUsagePrepayUnclear: Broad usage and prepay still unclear — negotiate before committing dates.
aiNote.escrowFundedTrackDelivery: Escrow is funded — track deliverables and publish timing in the deal packet.

actionReason.dangerTerms: Potentially risky usage or exclusivity language detected

actionReason.deadline48h: Deadline within the next few days

actionReason.nearFloorRate: Offer near your rate-card floor ({{floor}}) — room to negotiate

mockAiActions.archivedBody: No budget or paid usage signal.

inboxThreadDetail.errorDesc: Something went wrong loading this thread.

aiRulesCalloutBody.both: This thread was classified and summarized with keyword rules. Budget, deliverables, and risks may be incomplete until LLM is available.
aiRulesCalloutBody.classification: This thread was classified with keyword rules. Category and value band may differ from LLM results.
aiRulesCalloutBody.brief: This brief was built with keyword rules. Budget, deliverables, and usage rights may be incomplete.

categoryReason.pr_sample: Unpaid samples stay out of your urgent queue.
categoryReason.media: Press asks stay separate from paid deals.
categoryReason.personal: Fan mail stays out of deal workflows.
categoryReason.spam: Bulk marketing with no real partnership intent.

trainingTitle.personal: Keep personal mail out of deals

trainingDesc.commercial: Similar threads from {{brand}} surface in Today.

trainingDesc.spam: Future spam stays archived and out of Priority.
trainingDesc.other: Future unclear threads stay in Other.

recommendedActions.confirmExclusiveTerms: Confirm exclusivity, placement, and reuse terms before quoting.

inboxScreen.rateCardMissingTitle: Set a rate card to unlock high-value sorting

aiRulesBannerBody.both: LLM is not configured or unavailable. Classification and briefs use keyword rules, so results may be less accurate than AI.
aiRulesBannerBody.classification: LLM is not configured or unavailable. Mail classification uses keyword rules, so categories and value bands may be less accurate.
aiRulesBannerBody.brief: LLM is not configured or unavailable. Brief extraction uses keyword rules, so budget and deliverables may be incomplete.

inboxScreen.syncResultBodyProcessing: AI is still classifying and extracting details. This card will update when processing finishes.

inboxScreen.syncResultOtherFolderSaved: {{count}} from Sent or other folders saved as raw mail only
inboxScreen.syncResultNoChanges: No new mail needs to enter the inbox

inboxScreen.syncProgressBodyBriefFailed: {{failed}} brief extraction(s) failed. Classification is still available — try syncing again later.
inboxScreen.descPriority: High-value deals first, then follow-ups and escrow delivery.
inboxScreen.descAll: Shows INBOX mail after AI classification; Sent and other folders are saved as raw mail only and are not listed here.
inboxScreen.emptyCommercialDesc: All mail stays classified; this view shows high-value and follow-up threads, including active escrow delivery.

inboxScreen.mailboxRetryWritebackA11y: Retry failed native mailbox writeback jobs

mailboxPushMissingReason.GMAIL_TOPIC_NAME: Configure bioby.mailbox.webhook.gmail-topic-name on the server (GCP Pub/Sub topic for Gmail push).
mailboxPushMissingReason.WEBHOOK_BASE_URL: Configure bioby.mailbox.webhook.base-url on the server (public HTTPS URL for provider webhooks).
mailboxPushMissingReason.PUSH_NOT_SUPPORTED: Provider push notifications are not supported for this mailbox connection.
mailboxPushMissingReason.RECONSENT_REQUIRED: Reconnect the mailbox before registering push notifications.

outcomeSummary.gammaRemediationInProgress: Remediation in progress. Keep evidence and timeline clean.
outcomeSummary.nordstromAllVerified: All deliverables verified and final payout released.
outcomeSummary.harborGiftDealComplete: Gift-turned-paid deal completed on time with full escrow release.

dealDeliveryScreen.feedbackNoteAfterScriptAlt: Script uploaded. Submit rough cut when brand approves.
dealDeliveryScreen.feedbackNoteAfterRough: Rough cut uploaded. Brand has 48h to review.
dealDeliveryScreen.feedbackNoteAfterRoughReview: Brand is reviewing your rough cut.
dealDeliveryScreen.feedbackNoteAfterFinal: Final export received. Open verification to submit publish proof.
dealDeliveryScreen.feedbackNoteVerification: Submit verification proof to release remaining escrow.
dealDeliveryScreen.feedbackNoteReviewingRoughV1: Brand is reviewing rough cut v1.
dealDeliveryScreen.feedbackNotePrReviewingDraft: PR manager reviewing draft — creative control on hook wording.
dealDeliveryScreen.feedbackNoteWaitingScriptV2: Waiting on brand feedback for script v2.
dealDeliveryScreen.feedbackNoteTighterProductMention: Brand wants tighter product mention in first 8 seconds.
dealDeliveryScreen.uploadSuccessBody: Delivery timeline updated. Brand can review when applicable.
dealDeliveryScreen.evidenceBrandCopy: Rough cut submitted; one feedback window remains.
dealDeliveryScreen.evidenceDecisionCopy: Approved → final publish. Scope change → packet first.
dealDeliveryScreen.alertReminderBody: Reminder ready—check timing and scope before send.
dealDeliveryScreen.ctaVerificationLockedHint: Upload script → rough → final, then open verification.
dealDeliveryScreen.prepayHero: Escrow must be funded before delivery files count
dealDeliveryScreen.prepayCopy: Return to the deal overview and tap "Record prepay received", then come back here.
dealDeliveryScreen.uploadCopy: Tap each file below in order (script → rough → final). MVP simulates upload—no file picker yet.
dealDeliveryScreen.readyVerificationHero: Final export registered — submit publish proof next
dealDeliveryScreen.readyVerificationCopy: Open verification to submit post link, screenshots, and day-one metrics.
dealDeliveryScreen.demoModeHint: Delivery milestones require the live API workspace. Switch out of local demo or connect the backend.

script.statePending: Not started · share script before filming
script.successBody: Production is in progress. Submit the rough cut when the brand approves the script.
script.guide: Step 1 of 3: register your script draft. Brand reviews before you move to rough cut.

rough.successBody: Brand review window is open. Upload the final export when they approve—or after the window closes.
rough.guide: Step 2 of 3: submit rough cut. Brand gets a 48h review window before final delivery.

final.successBody: Delivery is complete. Open verification to submit publish proof and day-one metrics.
final.guide: Step 3 of 3: register final export, then open verification to submit publish proof.

dealVerificationScreen.loadFailedDesc: Pull to retry or return to the deal overview.
dealVerificationScreen.title: Submit proof
dealVerificationScreen.summarySubmittedCopy: After approval, payouts move to release.
dealVerificationScreen.summaryDraftCopy: Add the publish link, confirm the screenshot, then fill in day-one metrics and a short note to submit.
dealVerificationScreen.screenshotDesc: Include handle, publish time, and disclosure markers.
dealVerificationScreen.foundLinksHint: Complete the evidence fields below to update preflight status.
dealVerificationScreen.confirmBeforeSubmitHint: All proof needs your confirmation prior to submission.
dealVerificationScreen.screenshotAttestLabel: I uploaded a screenshot showing handle, publish time, and disclosure
dealVerificationScreen.checklistBlockedHint: Confirm on-time publish, format/disclosure/usage rights, and compliance before submitting.
dealVerificationScreen.submitBlockedHint: Add a valid publish link (https://), upload proof and confirm the screenshot, and fill day-one metrics plus a note (at least 6 characters each).
dealVerificationScreen.placeholderNote: e.g. disclosure pinned; brand appears in first 5s
dealVerificationScreen.checkFormat: Format, disclosure, and usage rights match packet
dealVerificationScreen.submitErrorBody: Check your connection and try again.
dealVerificationScreen.deliveryIncompleteHint: Register script → rough → final on the Delivery screen before submitting proof here.
dealVerificationScreen.approveAlertBody: Brand approved verification and escrow was released.
dealVerificationScreen.approveErrorBody: Submit verification first, then retry brand approval.
dealVerificationScreen.brandReviewPendingHint: Waiting for brand to approve verification before balance release.
dealVerificationScreen.settleAlertBody: Funds marked settled and the opportunity is closed.
dealVerificationScreen.settleErrorBody: Please retry after verification is submitted.

onboardingSync.mailboxBackendBypassed: Backend API is off, so sync was skipped.
onboardingSync.mailboxUpToDate: Mailbox is already up to date.
onboardingSync.mailboxSyncDoneEmpty: Connection saved, but no new messages were found.
onboardingSync.mailboxSyncDone: Sync complete. {{totalNew}} new message(s) found ({{inboxNewCount}} inbox, {{nonInboxNewCount}} sent/other).
onboardingSync.inboxFilterFallback: Could not save inbox filter preference

onboardingProfileScreen.title: Creator profile
onboardingProfileScreen.whyProfileSubtitle: AI matches deals to your channel.
onboardingProfileScreen.placeholderTags: Add tags one at a time

onboardingEmailScreen.title: Connect inbox
onboardingEmailScreen.aiImportsSubtitle: Brand mail becomes tasks. Skip to explore demo.
onboardingEmailScreen.controlHint: Quotes and rights still need you.
onboardingEmailScreen.manualSetupSubtitle: Fallback for providers that require IMAP app passwords.
onboardingEmailScreen.qqAuthHint: Use your QQ Mail authorization code from mail.qq.com settings — not your QQ login password.

onboardingConsentScreen.title: AI boundaries
onboardingConsentScreen.privacyTitle: Allow AI to use collaboration context
onboardingConsentScreen.privacySubtitle: Profile and mail inform budget and risk.
onboardingConsentScreen.modeAssistSubtitle: Low-risk auto-send; quotes and payouts need you.
onboardingConsentScreen.boundaryTitle: Anything touching money or rights always needs you
onboardingConsentScreen.boundaryBody: Quotes, rights, payouts, exclusivity, and disputes stay manual.

onboardingInboxFilterScreen.title: How should we filter your inbox?
onboardingInboxFilterScreen.relaxedSubtitle: Show more collaboration signals even when the brief is incomplete.
onboardingInboxFilterScreen.standardSubtitle: Recommended. Balance real deals and noisy mail.
onboardingInboxFilterScreen.strictSubtitle: Keep unclear budgets and suspicious pitches out of high value.
onboardingInboxFilterScreen.hintBody: You can change this anytime in Account. Manual corrections still override the preset.

onboardingCompleteScreen.title: Workspace ready
onboardingCompleteScreen.freeTierLine1: Handle up to 100 brand collaboration emails / month · No card required
onboardingCompleteScreen.aiReachTitle: How far AI can go for you
onboardingCompleteScreen.aiReachAssistCopy: Low-risk auto; money and rights stay with you.
onboardingCompleteScreen.emailConnectedTitle: Inbox is in the AI loop
onboardingCompleteScreen.emailSkippedPrimary: Explore mock opportunities and proposals first.
onboardingCompleteScreen.emailConnectedPrimary: Brand mail sorted by budget, rights, payout, and risk.

account.inboxFilterApplying: Reclassifying inbox with the new filter…
account.overviewError: Couldn't load account data from the server.

replayConfirm.title: Run setup again?
replayConfirm.message: Clears profile, inbox, and AI prefs. You stay signed in.

replyStyleScreen.lead: How AI sends replies. Applies immediately.
replyStyleScreen.savedNote: Quotes, rights, payouts, and disputes always need approval.

tagInput.hint: Tap Add after each tag. Tap × to remove.

creatorProfileEditor.fetchedStatsHint: Fetched from your profile link. Use Refresh to update.
creatorProfileEditor.summarySubtitle: How brands see you across channels. Edit freely — platform lookups will not overwrite these fields.
creatorProfileEditor.aiGenerateErrorFallback: Try again later or fill in your profile manually.
creatorProfileEditor.aiGenerateEndpointMissing: Creator API is missing the generate-summary endpoint. Rebuild and restart the backend, then try again.
creatorProfileEditor.aiPromptMessageSingle: Bioby AI can aggregate your display name, bio, and tags from the platforms you connected.
creatorProfileEditor.aiPromptMessageMulti: You connected more platforms. Re-aggregate your profile with Bioby AI?
creatorProfileEditor.suggestionSubtitle: Review the suggested fields before adopting. Platform stats stay read-only.
creatorProfileEditor.suggestionLowConfidence: Please double-check this suggestion before adopting.

profileSettingsScreen.lead: How brands see you in drafts and your kit.
profileSettingsScreen.resolveErrorFallback: We could not read this profile yet.

dataExportScreen.lead: Export workspace data or open financial records.
